message:
feat(cli,robot,tui,e2e): recognize Cursor, Windsurf, and Aider agent types across all layers

Wire three new agent types (Cursor, Windsurf, Aider) through every layer
that previously only knew Claude, Codex, and Gemini:

Events (internal/events/):
- SessionCreateData gains CursorCount, WindsurfCount, AiderCount fields
- EmitSessionCreate() signature extended with 3 new count params
- Tests updated to pass new params and assert on new fields

CLI (internal/cli/):
- analytics.go: aggregateStats() and buildSessionDetails() extract
  new counts from event data
- spawn.go: SpawnOptions gains AssignCCOnly/CodOnly/GmiOnly fields,
  EmitSessionCreate passes new counts, agent counting includes new
  types, Agent Mail registration refactored to registerSpawnedAgents()
  with per-agent info, parseLocalFallbackProvider early return fix

Robot (internal/robot/):
- errors.go, health.go: agentTypeFromPaneType() and
  detectAgentTypeFromPane() gain cases for new tmux agent types
- errors_test.go, spawn_test.go: updated expectations and test cases
- tokens.go: aggregateTokenStats() extracts new spawn counts

Dashboard (internal/tui/dashboard/):
- dashboard.go: updateTickerData() passes new counts, renderStatsBar()
  gains Cursor/Windsurf/Aider badges (Robot icon, Success color)
- panels/ticker.go: TickerData struct gains 3 new count fields,
  buildPlainFleetSegment() renders Cur:N, W:N, A:N
- panels/ticker_test.go: 9-agent test case updated
- dashboard_layout_test.go: fleet count test expanded

E2E tests:
- robot_mode_test.go: JSON struct definitions gain new count fields
- session_lifecycle_test.go: event golden data updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,11 +84,14 @@ func NewEventWithCorrelation(eventType EventType, session, agentName, correlatio
 
 // SessionCreateData contains data for session_create events.
 type SessionCreateData struct {
-	ClaudeCount int    `json:"claude_count,omitempty"`
-	CodexCount  int    `json:"codex_count,omitempty"`
-	GeminiCount int    `json:"gemini_count,omitempty"`
-	WorkDir     string `json:"work_dir,omitempty"`
-	Recipe      string `json:"recipe,omitempty"`
+	ClaudeCount   int    `json:"claude_count,omitempty"`
+	CodexCount    int    `json:"codex_count,omitempty"`
+	GeminiCount   int    `json:"gemini_count,omitempty"`
+	CursorCount   int    `json:"cursor_count,omitempty"`
+	WindsurfCount int    `json:"windsurf_count,omitempty"`
+	AiderCount    int    `json:"aider_count,omitempty"`
+	WorkDir       string `json:"work_dir,omitempty"`
+	Recipe        string `json:"recipe,omitempty"`
 }
 
 // AgentSpawnData contains data for agent_spawn events.
